sourceTitle: Guidance for use of Generative AI tools
evidenceSnippetOriginal: You should disclose the use of generative AI tools for all academic, educational, and research-related uses. Do not publish research results that rely on content generated through the use of a generative AI tool without disclosing the nature of the use of such generative AI tool in producing the content.
evidenceLocator: Section: 'Be transparent about your use of AI tools'
